step_rationale: Cytoplasmic enzyme released during myocardial necrosis; AMI-associated metabolic injury marker.
mechanism: Cytoplasmic transaminase released from cardiomyocyte necrosis reflecting ischemic myocardial injury.

references.title: Plasma proteomics implicate glutamic oxaloacetic transaminases as potential markers for acute myocardial infarction.
A plasma proteomic approach in patients with heart failure after acute myocardial infarction: insights into the pathogenesis and progression of the disease.
